input_transcript: during that period i was traveling
notes: In dictation mode, the noun 'period' must stay literal when it is ordinary prose rather than a punctuation command.

input_transcript: we literally say the word comma in this example
notes: The literal word 'comma' should not be converted into punctuation when the sentence is talking about the word itself.

input_transcript: i asked why she kept saying question mark out loud
notes: The phrase 'question mark' can be quoted speech, not a command. Avoid inserting punctuation from literal mention alone.

input_transcript: new line is the text i want not a formatting command
notes: The phrase 'new line' can be content. Do not insert a real newline unless command intent is clear.

input_transcript: open quote is what the button is called
notes: Literal mentions of 'open quote' should stay as words, not become a quote character.
